title: zephyranthes chlorosolen
intro: Zephyranthes chlorosolen, also known as the white zephyr lily, is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaryllidaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Zephyranthes chlorosolen are thought to include reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and potentially treating wounds. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by drying the leaves and flowers, and can be administered in tea or tincture form.
